full_text:
EyeMT project

overview-experiments-data-next steps

Iga Niemiec 10.03.2026

Overview

Aims

Exploration of spatial and transcriptomics profiles of closely interacting immune cells within HGSC tumor microenvironment (TME)
Discovery of spatially-restricted immune escape mechanisms (IEMs) and perturbations in immune cells transcriptomics profiles
identifying underlying mechanisms of IEMs 
discovery of new therapeutic targets

Tumor Escape Mechanisms

Galassi et al. 2024; The hallmarks of cancer immune evasion

MHCI-TCR recognition 
T-cell cytotoxicity

APC recruitment

APC antigen uptake

physical exclustion

Speaker notes:
CAMOUFLAGE - avoid being localized by immune cells IMMUNE EXCLUSION - physical barrier

Tumor Escape Mechanisms

Galassi et al. 2024; The hallmarks of cancer immune evasion

APC maturation

T-cell exhaustion

cytokine modulation

Speaker notes:
CAMOUFLAGE - avoid being localized by immune cells IMMUNE EXCLUSION - physical barrier

Tumor Escape Mechanisms

Galassi et al. 2024; The hallmarks of cancer immune evasion

MHCI-TCR signalling

T-cell suppression and apoptosis

Speaker notes:
CAMOUFLAGE - avoid being localized by immune cells IMMUNE EXCLUSION - physical barrier

Perturbations in paracrine signalling

Galassi et al. 2024; The hallmarks of cancer immune evasion

Speaker notes:

tCycIF-GeoMx experiment

tCycIF

GeoMx

selected regions of interest (ROIs) 
divided into areas of illumination (AOIs)
whole transcriptome / selected panel - probe based sequencing
multi cellular resolution 
~200x200μm ROI = 100-300 cells

t-CycIF and GeoMx integration

Batch 1+2: 
10 ROIs/sample
Batch 3: 15-25 ROIs/sample

ROI

AOI

CD20 in batch3 TLS subset

Patients:
7 HRD
35 HRP
2 ?

12 PDS
16 IDS

Data Analysis

Integration of 3 data layers

germline mutations
somatic mutations
HRD/HRP status
cancer neoepitopes
TCR/BCR repertoire

cell-types distribution patterns and communities
cell distribution whole-slide metrics

transcriptomics pathway activities
DGE + pathways enrichment
L-R interactions
Gene Regulatory Networks

Patient (n=43)

2. Whole Slide (n=58)

3. ROI (n=1180)

tCycIF spatial analysis

Overview of SPACEstat workflow

Community detection with Leiden algorithm

single-cell hubs (families) thr = 10 cells + 15-17um

multi-cell communities (villages) thr = 300um

CycIF-GeoMx integration

Overlaying GeoMx and CycIF image with QuPath + Warpy extension
rotating/pulling with the usage of tissue landmarks
finding ROI coordinates on corresponding CycIF slide

Calculating nr of phenotyped cells within CycIF ROIs

Calculating nr of ROIs with immune communities

GeoMx ROIs vs tCycIF immune communities

batch3TLS (17 samples):

379 GeoMx ROIs:
21: too small tCycIF cell nr 
(removed during QC)
 39: no single cell hubs/families 
(not enough same close cells)
24: single cell hubs present, but outside of communities/villages

295 ROIs with immune cell communities
80% of ROIs with cells
77% of total ROI nr

GeoMx Deconvolution - sd vs bp

Deconvolution sanity check: does predicted ct fraction grows predictably with ssGSE score for cell type specific markers?

Trustworthy:
tumor
Fibroblasts
Macrophages
DCs (sd only)
Bcells (sd only)
CD8 + CD4 Tcells

Unrustworthy:
NKs
Mast cells
Tcells other

DGE between ROIs of different ct composition

Multiple immune related DEGs between ROI groups with different immune ct composition
Mostly DEGs are found only in stromal AOI of IDS samples

DGE between ROIs of different ct composition

Multiple immune related DEGs between ROI groups with different immune ct composition
Mostly DEGs are found only in stromal AOI of IDS samples

DEGs computed on geomx full-signal are partially reflecting just different ct composition - need to rerun analysis for deconvoluted ct specific profiles

Next steps

Next steps 1 - GeoMX analysis to perform

ssGSEA: 
analysis of immune signalling pathways
identification of pathways/roi clusters with correlated pathway activities
finding pathways which activity correlates with other immune cells frequencies
DEG:
analysis of deconvoluted cell type specific profiles
GO and KEGG enrichment analysis (finding pathways enriched with DEGs)
Ligand-Receptor - identification of key LR pairs
Gene Regulatory Networks - identification of key TFs

identifying underlying mechanisms of IEMs

Zhihan Liang - GeoMx experiment
